task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

Verify sender/entity against canonical cast and requested invoices

Select oldest 2 linked invoices and draft reply

Select oldest two linked invoices and prepare outbox reply

Then gather oldest two linked invoices

Validate sender email mapping for Miles

Find founder-linked invoices using discovered fields

Write outbound reply draft with two oldest invoices attached

next_step.current_state: Found five Nina-linked invoices; to satisfy security rule for file transmission I must read the specific source files being sent before finalizing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbox lane AGENTS before writing
Write outbound draft with two oldest invoice attachments (newest-first ordering rule)
next_step.observation: Search confirmed five invoice files explicitly linked to Nina Schreiber; the two oldest by date are 2025-11-03 (inv_0001) and 2025-12-01 (inv_0002).

next_step.current_state: Collected required invoice evidence; before writing outbound record I need outbox lane local rules.

Delete processed inbox file and report completion
next_step.observation: Read both source invoice files to be attached, satisfying the requirement to inspect source content before transmission decisions.

next_step.current_state: Outbox lane rules read; now loading nested outbox folder rules before creating outbound email file.
next_step.observation: 60_outbox rules confirm using entity primary_contact_email for recipient resolution and durable outbound state under outbox/.

next_step.current_state: All required evidence gathered and authority resolved; proceeding to create the outbound reply record with the two oldest Nina-linked invoices attached in required newest-first attachment order.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email record in outbox
next_step.observation: Prepared outbound email details: recipient miles@novak.example, subject reply to invoice request, and attachments set to inv_0002 then inv_0001 per newest-first ordering rule.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to the founder you talk product with (Nina Schreiber).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears valid: attachments were both previously read and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and YAML subject quoting is correct. Proceeding to inbox cleanup per workflow.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed lowest inbox item, verified identity and invoice linkage, created outbox draft, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it: I verified the sender as Miles via canonical cast identity, resolved the referenced founder as Nina Schreiber, identified the oldest two Nina-linked invoices, created an outbound reply draft with those invoice files attached, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox workflow for lowest filename, used email-processing and sending-email workflows for reply handling, verified sender with canonical primary_contact_email, read source files before transmission decision, ordered attachments newest-first per outbox rule, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence supports OUTCOME_OK: sender header from 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md matches 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email; founder context resolved by 10_entities/cast/nina.md (startup_partner, product context); invoice linkage proven by related_entity rows in the two read invoice files; outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with exact existing attachment paths.
